recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: The Cleanse
recommendations.overview: The story of a heartbroken man who attends a spiritual retreat, only to discover that the course releases more than everyday toxins and traumatic experiences.

recommendations.title: Faults
recommendations.overview: Claire is under the grip of a mysterious new cult called Faults. Desperate to be reunited with their daughter, Claire's parents recruit one of the world's foremost experts on mind control, Ansel Roth.

recommendations.title: Summerland
recommendations.overview: A woman during the Second World War opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Ghost Killers vs. Bloody Mary
recommendations.overview: A group of three youtubers who call themselves experts in supernatural beings decide to win public recognition once and for all. For this they plot a plan to capture a being known to all. It is the spirit of a light-haired woman who died in an unknow

recommendations.title: Mythica: A Quest for Heroes
recommendations.overview: Stuck in a life of indentured servitude, Marek dreams of becoming a wizard. When she meets the beautiful priestess Teela in need of help, she offers her assistance and provides a motley troupe. Together they go in search of Teela's sister, who was ki

recommendations.title: Yellow Submarine
recommendations.overview: The wicked Blue Meanies take over Pepperland, eliminating all color and music. As the only survivor, the Lord Admiral escapes in the yellow submarine and journeys to Liverpool to enlist the help of the Beatles.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Heal the Living
recommendations.overview: The intersecting lives of teens on a surfing trip, a woman with a weak heart and two teams of doctors and medical experts.
